channel.title: Latest from Android Central
channel.description: All the latest content from the Android Central team

item.title: Nothing is refreshing the Ear (open) with a color that stands out
item.description: Nothing’s Ear (open) is getting a bold blue makeover on May 11, keeping its awareness-friendly open-ear design.
item.author: techkritiko@gmail.com (Jay Bonggolto)
item.dc:creator: Jay Bonggolto

media:content.media:description: Nothing Ear (open)
media:content.media:text: Nothing Ear (open)
media:content.media:title: Nothing Ear (open)

item.title: Samsung achieves 'Fainting Prediction' on Galaxy Watch, will expand preventative features
item.description: Samsung highlighted its Galaxy Watch's ability to "predict" fainting spells for user safety in collaboration with a Korean hospital.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: The Samsung Galaxy Watch 8.
media:content.media:text: The Samsung Galaxy Watch 8.
media:content.media:title: The Samsung Galaxy Watch 8.

item.title: As if we needed more problems, Pixel users now struggle with wonky eSIMs
item.description: Users' eSIMs are the latest source of problems for them in their Google Pixel, as reports say a staggering bug is causing headaches.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: The At a Glance widget on the Pixel 10
media:content.media:text: The At a Glance widget on the Pixel 10
media:content.media:title: The At a Glance widget on the Pixel 10

item.title: Google Health will leave behind some classic Fitbit app features: Here's all of them
item.description: Some of Fitbit's most charming features might not survive the Google era.
item.author: sanujb6@gmail.com (Sanuj Bhatia)
item.dc:creator: Sanuj Bhatia

media:content.media:description: Fitbit personal health coach focus metrics
media:content.media:text: Fitbit personal health coach focus metrics
media:content.media:title: Fitbit personal health coach focus metrics

item.title: This is the only $49 smartwatch that I would buy in 2026
item.description: The CMF Watch Pro 2 won't win any awards for innovation, but it's a cheap smartwatch with a few flagship-level specs that might surprise you.
item.author: patrick.farmer@futurenet.com (Patrick Farmer)
item.dc:creator: Patrick Farmer

media:content.media:description: Wearing the silver CMF Watch Pro 2 with the orange band
media:content.media:text: Wearing the silver CMF Watch Pro 2 with the orange band
media:content.media:title: Wearing the silver CMF Watch Pro 2 with the orange band

item.title: Android 17's first QPR gets a second beta, fixing instability and glitchy gestures
item.description: Pixel users are getting another dose of fixes for Google's Android 17 QPR1 Beta 2 this week.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: The Android 17 logo on a Google Pixel 10 Pro XL

item.title: Samsung and LG reignite OLED rivalry with morphing, captivating screens at SID Display Week 2026
item.description: Samsung Display highlighted the many innovations it showcased, like morphing car screens during SID Display Week 2026.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: Samsung Display's colorful, screen-filled booth at SID Display Week 2026.

media:content.media:title: Samsung Display's colorful, screen-filled booth at SID Display Week 2026.

item.title: 4 things to pay attention to when trying to pick the right phone charger for your Android phone
item.description: Wondering how to pick the right phone charger for your Android phone? I have a fail-safe method of narrowing down the perfect match for your needs.
item.author: namerah.saud-fatmi@futurenet.com (Namerah Saud Fatmi)
item.dc:creator: Namerah Saud Fatmi

media:content.media:description: Various USB-C chargers from Anker, UGREEN, and Baseus.
media:content.media:text: Various USB-C chargers from Anker, UGREEN, and Baseus.
media:content.media:title: Various USB-C chargers from Anker, UGREEN, and Baseus.

item.title: The 'fantastic' Garmin Fenix 8 just scored a rare discount at Amazon — but is the premium fitness watch still worth it?
item.description: Whether you're running, swimming, hiking, or simply going for a walk, the Garmin Fenix 8 is a powerhouse of fitness tracking technology.
item.author: patrick.farmer@futurenet.com (Patrick Farmer)
item.dc:creator: Patrick Farmer

media:content.media:description: Training Readiness widget on the Garmin Fenix 8
media:content.media:text: Training Readiness widget on the Garmin Fenix 8
media:content.media:title: Training Readiness widget on the Garmin Fenix 8

item.title: Viture already has the best smart glasses ecosystem, and these two new products somehow make it even better
item.description: I've loved Viture's extended smart glasses ecosystem for years, and now things just got even better with a pair of new releases.
item.dc:creator: Nicholas Sutrich

media:content.media:description: Viture Beast smart glasses connected to an Abxylute S9V controller, with Monster Hunter Outlanders playing on a Google Pixel 10 Pro XL
media:content.media:text: Viture Beast smart glasses connected to an Abxylute S9V controller, with Monster Hunter Outlanders playing on a Google Pixel 10 Pro XL
media:content.media:title: Viture Beast smart glasses connected to an Abxylute S9V controller, with Monster Hunter Outlanders playing on a Google Pixel 10 Pro XL

item.title: The Fitbit app is rebranding and becoming Google Health — here's what to know
item.description: Google is rebranding the Fitbit app to Google Health, and making sweeping changes to the service along the way. Here's what Fitbit users should know.
item.author: bradypsnyder@gmail.com (Brady Snyder)
item.dc:creator: Brady Snyder

media:content.media:description: The app overview for the Google Health app.
media:content.media:text: The app overview for the Google Health app.
media:content.media:title: The app overview for the Google Health app.

item.title: Google's Fitbit Air is finally here, and it's the screenless fitness band we've been waiting for
item.description: Google's highly anticipated fitness band, the Fitbit Air, is official — and it only costs $99. Here's everything it can track on your wrist.
item.author: bradypsnyder@gmail.com (Brady Snyder)
item.dc:creator: Brady Snyder

media:content.media:description: The Google Fitbit Air screenless fitness band.
media:content.media:text: The Google Fitbit Air screenless fitness band.
media:content.media:title: The Google Fitbit Air screenless fitness band.

item.title: The TCL NXTPAPER 70 Pro is the most innovative budget phone on the market — it's also free at Metro by T-Mobile
item.description: Innovative display technology doesn't have to cost an arm and a leg - Metro by T-Mobile is giving away the TCL NXTPAPER 70 Pro for FREE with an eligible line.
item.author: patrick.farmer@futurenet.com (Patrick Farmer)
item.dc:creator: Patrick Farmer

media:content.media:description: Quick toggles on the TCL NXTPAPER 70 Pro's display

media:content.media:title: Quick toggles on the TCL NXTPAPER 70 Pro's display

item.title: I finally figured out why no one can hear me in multiplayer Quest games
item.description: Have you ever been playing a Meta Quest multiplayer game, but no one can hear you? I finally found the fix, and it isn't the game's fault.
item.dc:creator: Nicholas Sutrich

media:content.media:description: Holding my hand over my mouth while wearing a Meta Quest 3 with a BoboVR S3 Pro head strap
media:content.media:text: Holding my hand over my mouth while wearing a Meta Quest 3 with a BoboVR S3 Pro head strap

item.title: Chipolo and Secrid just created the smartest way to never lose your wallet again
item.description: Chipolo collaborated with Secrid, a Dutch pocketwear brand, to give us an excellent hack for finding our wallets.

item.title: I used the world's thinnest 13-inch tablet, and it made me ditch the iPad Pro
item.description: Huawei just launched the MatePad Pro Max, and with a 13.2-inch OLED panel, bigger battery, and ultra-sleek design, it may just be the iPad Pro rival you need.
